textDisplay: I live in LA and my brother and I randomly decided to go to Holywood for fun yesterday. Turn out they had Hobbs & Shaw premiere on the walk of fame. we waited there for like 2 hours in hope of seeing the legend Rock. I literally shake hand with Jason Statham and saw the rock from a really far distance. I guessed it's because we waited there for so long and a lot of people left, a staff just randomly approached us and asked if we wanted Hobbs & Shaw world premiere tickets for FREE. So we got the tickets and went into the theatre, they gave us free soda and popcorn as well!! And Gosh, the whole cast was there and the stage was huge. Johnson looked amazing with the brown suit! The movie was super exciting and fun to watch. The guest appearances were surprising, I swear I screamed when I saw them!!!!! It was one of my luckiest days but I mean it's LA so a lot of random things could happen lol.....
textOriginal: I live in LA and my brother and I randomly decided to go to Holywood for fun yesterday. Turn out they had Hobbs & Shaw premiere on the walk of fame. we waited there for like 2 hours in hope of seeing the legend Rock. I literally shake hand with Jason Statham and saw the rock from a really far distance. I guessed it's because we waited there for so long and a lot of people left, a staff just randomly approached us and asked if we wanted Hobbs & Shaw world premiere tickets for FREE. So we got the tickets and went into the theatre, they gave us free soda and popcorn as well!! And Gosh, the whole cast was there and the stage was huge. Johnson looked amazing with the brown suit! The movie was super exciting and fun to watch. The guest appearances were surprising, I swear I screamed when I saw them!!!!! It was one of my luckiest days but I mean it's LA so a lot of random things could happen lol.....

textDisplay:
The Opening

١  بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
1  In the name of Allah, the Gracious, the Merciful.
٢  الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِين
2  Praise be to Allah, Lord of the Worlds.
٣  الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيم
3  The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
٤  مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
4  Master of the Day of Judgment.
٥  إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِين
5  It is You we worship, and upon You we call for help.
٦  اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيم
6  Guide us to the straight path.
٧  صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
7  The path of those You have blessed, not of those against whom there is anger, nor of those who are misguided.
********

Monotheism
 بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
 In the name of Allah, the Gracious, the Merciful.
١  قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
1  Say, "He is Allah, the One.
٢  اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ
2  Allah, the Absolute.
٣  لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
3  He begets not, nor was He begotten.
٤  وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
4  And there is none comparable to Him."

textDisplay:
The Opening

١  بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
1  In the name of Allah, the Gracious, the Merciful.
٢  الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِين
2  Praise be to Allah, Lord of the Worlds.
٣  الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيم
3  The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
٤  مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
4  Master of the Day of Judgment.
٥  إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِين
5  It is You we worship, and upon You we call for help.
٦  اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيم
6  Guide us to the straight path.
٧  صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
7  The path of those You have blessed, not of those against whom there is anger, nor of those who are misguided.
********

Monotheism
 بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
 In the name of Allah, the Gracious, the Merciful.
١  قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
1  Say, "He is Allah, the One.
٢  اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ
2  Allah, the Absolute.
٣  لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
3  He begets not, nor was He begotten.
٤  وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
4  And there is none comparable to Him."

textDisplay:
I think it looks like a good action movie!! Vin diesel wasn’t in the 2nd, it was Paul & Tyrese. Neither paul walker or vin diesel were in the 3rd one , ‘Tokyo drift’ so i dont think we should be too critical about it. I do agree however that it must be a shame for car enthusiasts as it’s definitely more about the fantastical action than the actual cars but i think thats been happening over the last few movies! I don’t expect ‘hobbs and shaw’ will win an oscar but i will definitely want to watch it for some good old light hearted and visually stunning action!!
Plus i loved the banter between Hobbs & Shaw in the last one. The Rock and Statham with Idris Elba as well make an exciting trio for sure!
textOriginal:
I think it looks like a good action movie!! Vin diesel wasn’t in the 2nd, it was Paul & Tyrese. Neither paul walker or vin diesel were in the 3rd one , ‘Tokyo drift’ so i dont think we should be too critical about it. I do agree however that it must be a shame for car enthusiasts as it’s definitely more about the fantastical action than the actual cars but i think thats been happening over the last few movies! I don’t expect ‘hobbs and shaw’ will win an oscar but i will definitely want to watch it for some good old light hearted and visually stunning action!!
Plus i loved the banter between Hobbs & Shaw in the last one. The Rock and Statham with Idris Elba as well make an exciting trio for sure!

textDisplay:
The Opening

١  بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
1  In the name of Allah, the Gracious, the Merciful.
٢  الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِين
2  Praise be to Allah, Lord of the Worlds.
٣  الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيم
3  The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
٤  مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
4  Master of the Day of Judgment.
٥  إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِين
5  It is You we worship, and upon You we call for help.
٦  اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيم
6  Guide us to the straight path.
٧  صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
7  The path of those You have blessed, not of those against whom there is anger, nor of those who are misguided.
********

Monotheism
 بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
 In the name of Allah, the Gracious, the Merciful.
١  قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
1  Say, "He is Allah, the One.
٢  اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ
2  Allah, the Absolute.
٣  لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
3  He begets not, nor was He begotten.
٤  وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
4  And there is none comparable to Him."

textDisplay:
I was a fan from moment i heard about it but all the trailers just made me not want to go. They basically showed the whole movie in the previous trailers. And with this one, they showed anything that might have been left. I'm pretty sure the only thing they haven't showed us is the talking. With them showing the whole movie in the previous trailers, they should not have released this trailer because then I would have been at least surprised and excited to see all this. Now I'm like "Do I even want to go for the movie?" 
These guys should definitely learn how to make trailers. They should learn from the Russos.

textDisplay:
The Opening

١  بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
1  In the name of Allah, the Gracious, the Merciful.
٢  الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِين
2  Praise be to Allah, Lord of the Worlds.
٣  الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيم
3  The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
٤  مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ
4  Master of the Day of Judgment.
٥  إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِين
5  It is You we worship, and upon You we call for help.
٦  اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيم
6  Guide us to the straight path.
٧  صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
7  The path of those You have blessed, not of those against whom there is anger, nor of those who are misguided.
********

Monotheism
 بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
 In the name of Allah, the Gracious, the Merciful.
١  قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
1  Say, "He is Allah, the One.
٢  اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ
2  Allah, the Absolute.
٣  لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
3  He begets not, nor was He begotten.
٤  وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
4  And there is none comparable to Him."
